Precondition: box_2 is on top of box_1; right end effector is free.
Postcondition: box_2 has been pushed from its right side; box_1 top is unblocked.

Precondition: box_1 left and right sides are accessible; both end effectors are free.
Postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact on its left and right sides.
